message:
web: Make Bash tool calls expandable with status indicators

- Add collapsible output for Bash commands
- Show colored icon (green/red) based on exit status
- Display stdout and stderr separately when expanded
- Status text: Completed, Failed, Interrupted, or Completed with errors

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/0259ecdf-a6c5-4515-b4a6-77a0b0dc553a
